name: google-stitch
description: Community-maintained Codex plugin for the hosted Google Stitch MCP server. Unofficial and provided as-is.

interface.shortDescription: Community plugin for Google's hosted Stitch MCP server
interface.longDescription: Community-maintained Codex plugin for Google's hosted Stitch MCP server. This project is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported by Google, and is provided as-is. Use it to inspect Stitch projects and work with Stitch-generated design assets through the hosted API.
defaultPrompt: Show screens in this Stitch project
Generate a Stitch screen from this prompt
